heroOverlay.heading: SPECIALIST SERVICES
heroOverlay.subheading: More than just a workout space

contentBlocks.text:
At The Vault, training goes beyond sets and reps. Results come from the full picture - intelligent programming, recovery, nutrition, movement quality, and specialist coaching.

That’s why we offer a range of specialist services designed to help both clients and personal trainers get more from every session. Whether you’re looking to improve performance, recover properly, sharpen technique, or build a stronger body from the inside out, everything you need is here.

For clients, it means access to expert support in a private, premium environment.
For personal trainers, it means more tools, more value, and more ways to help your clients succeed.

seo.title: Specialist Services
seo.description: Specialist services at the Vault Gym include Personal Training, Muay Thai Boxing, Yoga, Pilates, Massage, Nutrition, Sports Specific Training, Course Venues, Physiotherapy
